name: SupportGroups.online
tagline: You don't have to go through it alone.
entity: ExpandedAwareness.io IP Holdings, a DBA of SlateRiver LLC

voice.tone: warm, safe, human, hopeful, non-clinical, inclusive
voice.personality: speaks like a trusted friend who also happens to have resources. Never condescending. Never clinical. Always validating first, then guiding.
do: Make the reader feel seen before making any offer
dont: Never promise cures or clinical outcomes
Avoid stigmatizing language around mental health
Don't use corporate or transactional language
Never position as therapy — this is peer support
sample_phrases: Whatever you're going through — someone else has been there. And they want to help.
Find your group. Find your people.
You've been carrying this alone long enough.
voice.crisis_note: Always include 988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline reference in mental health adjacent posts

aida.attention_hook: name a specific pain point or struggle with radical honesty
aida.interest: normalize the experience — 'millions feel this way'
aida.desire: paint a picture of what belonging to a real support community feels like
aida.action: find your group at supportgroups.online / join free / start a group
